raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed a credit card charge in the amount of {$29.00} in XX/XX/year>. The merchant provided various documents in late XXXX or XXXX, none of which validated the charge. The merchant did not have the cards CVC code or any form of signature showing I validated the charge in question. 

I immediately contacted Citi to raise this issue and was told the dispute would be reopened. I was told the charge would be suspended while the case was reassessed. As I would later discover, this did not happen. 

In XXXX, Citi sent me a statement showing the charge in addition to a late charge. Despite being told by the dispute department that I did not need to make payment, Citi had not removed the charge and had now assessed a late fee. 

I have called Citi XXXX or XXXX times to resolve this issue. Every time, I am connected to the dispute resolution team who have consistently reassured me that this issued would be handled. 

As of today. Citi has not removed the charge in question or the late fee. Citi continues to give me the run around without actually listening to me or looking into my claims. Citi has refused to remove the late fee from my account, despite the charge being in dispute this entire time. 

I would like the CFPB to help me make Citi do what is required by law and reverse the charge that was reported as unauthorized and for which the merchant has not provided any support to validate the charge was properly authorized.
